algorithmScorecard.optimization: Ask fans to 'Heart' the track in every CTA

algorithmScorecard.targetBenchmark: Multiple plays per user within 28 days

algorithmScorecard.optimization: Start the song IMMEDIATELY. No 20s intro skits

algorithmScorecard.explanation: Tells Spotify 'People want to keep this'
algorithmScorecard.targetBenchmark: Encourage users to add to personal playlists

radioAutoplayTriggers.goal: Get on 'Mac Miller Radio' or 'ProbCause Radio'
radioAutoplayTriggers.requirement: Data Associations - Spotify sees: 'User A listened to Mac Miller, then JaZeR, and didn't skip'
tactics: Drive external traffic (Ads/Socials) targeting Mac Miller fans specifically
Collab with artists who are already in that algorithm (smaller artists who sound like them)

metricBenchmarks.threshold: >50% means intro too long or playlist mismatch

metricBenchmarks.target: 1,000 streams in last 28 days OR 5,000 monthly active listeners

tacticalRecommendations.description: Vocals or melody must start within 0-3 seconds
tacticalRecommendations.rationale: Do not have a 15-second slow fade-in - instant skip
Don't make them wait for the hook

tacticalRecommendations.description: High-quality Canvas can increase share rate by 145%
